subject: stone golem
fact: A stone golem blocks the entrance to the vault acting as an unreasoning guardian.
source_quote: A stone golem blocks the entrance to the vault, acting as an unreasoning guardian.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur investigates the golem and determines it is programmed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen.
source_quote: Felkur investigates the golem and determines that it is programmed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen.

subject: golem bypass
fact: Felkur extracts Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear using a specialized gadget.
source_quote: Felkur extracts Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear, who had picked it up while jumping on the Arcanoloth's table earlier.

subject: golem reaction
fact: The golem steps aside to allow the party to reach the reinforced vault door after sensing the familiar scent.
source_quote: The golem, sensing the familiar scent, steps aside to allow the party to reach the reinforced vault door.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur uses his thieves' tools to expertly unlock the physical mechanism of the vault door.
source_quote: Felkur uses his thieves' tools to expertly unlock the physical mechanism of the vault door.

subject: vault chamber
fact: The vault chamber is a temperature-controlled room kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: The party enters a temperature-controlled chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: soul coins
fact: The vault chamber is lined with shelves of soul coins.
source_quote: lined with shelves of soul coins

subject: infernal ledgers
fact: The vault chamber contains shelves of infernal ledgers.
source_quote: shelves of soul coins, contracts, and infernal ledgers.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim uses his active True Seeing to confirm the room is free of traps.
source_quote: Bramgrim uses his active True Seeing to confirm the room is free of traps.

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The party discovers the Lexicon of Oaths, a massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made of processed souls.
source_quote: The party discovers the Lexicon of Oaths, a massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made of processed souls

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically updates with all infernal contracts.
source_quote: automatically updating with all infernal contracts.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur finds his own contract in the ledger identified as Transaction 44781.
source_quote: Felkur finds his own contract in the ledger: Transaction 44781

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Felkur sold a priceless brooch to a fence named Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces while intoxicated.
source_quote: revealing he sold a priceless brooch while intoxicated for 45 gold pieces to a fence named Limping Oric.

subject: priceless brooch
fact: Felkur's drunken fiddling accidentally activated the brooch's special ability.
source_quote: Felkur's drunken fiddling accidentally activated the brooch's special ability

subject: Felkur
fact: The brooch's ability made Felkur impervious to being located.
source_quote: making him impervious to being located

subject: Phantom Thief legacy
fact: Felkur became known as the 'Phantom Thief' due to the brooch's ability.
source_quote: which is why he became known as the 'Phantom Thief'

subject: Maerimydra executions
fact: The Phantom Thief's actions caused the execution of high investigators in Maerimydra.
source_quote: and caused the execution of high investigators in Maerimydra.

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party to retrieve the Lexicon.
source_quote: Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party to retrieve the Lexicon.

subject: elevator approach
fact: An elevator is heard approaching the vault.
source_quote: As an elevator is heard approaching

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur discovers a loophole in his contract with Maram il Vass stating he is not obligated to deliver the tome if his information is removed.
source_quote: Felkur discovers a loophole in his contract with Maram il Vass: if the book no longer contains his information, he is not obligated to deliver the tome.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur decides against ripping a page out of the Lexicon of Oaths to avoid leaving a trace.
source_quote: Felkur decides against ripping a page out of the Lexicon of Oaths to avoid leaving a trace of the theft.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur scrambles the magical ledger to replace his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: Felkur scrambles the magical ledger to replace his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur forges a new entry in the book attributing the theft to the 'Phantom Thief'.
source_quote: Felkur successfully forges a new entry in the book, attributing the theft to the 'Phantom Thief'.

subject: Vraxen's personal journal
fact: The party discovers Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: The party discovers Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: soul coin ledger
fact: The party discovers a soul coin ledger with blackmail potential.
source_quote: a soul coin ledger with blackmail potential

subject: blank infernal contracts
fact: The party discovers blank infernal contracts in the vault.
source_quote: and blank infernal contracts.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur steals a large pure crystal known as Faerzess Shard.
source_quote: Felkur steals a large pure crystal known as Faerzess Shard

subject: Faerzess Shard
fact: The Faerzess Shard is intended to enhance Felkur's artificer abilities.
source_quote: to enhance his artificer abilities.

subject: golem reactivation
fact: A fail-safe security system begins to reactivate the stone golem guarding the vault.
source_quote: A fail-safe security system begins to reactivate the stone golem guarding the vault.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim helps the party locate a secret door within the chamber.
source_quote: Bramgrim helps the party locate a secret door within the chamber.

subject: secret passage escape
fact: The adventurers slip through the secret passage and climb toward the top of the tower.
source_quote: The adventurers slip through the secret passage and climb toward the top of the tower

subject: spire peak chamber
fact: The party arrives at a 60-foot diameter chamber at the peak of the spire.
source_quote: The party arrives at a 60-foot diameter chamber at the peak of the spire

subject: teleportation circle
fact: The chamber contains a permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy.
source_quote: containing a permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: spire peak chamber
fact: The teleportation circle is surrounded by poisonous clouds.
source_quote: surrounded by poisonous clouds.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur uses his artificer tools and collected crystals to begin recalibrating the portal.
source_quote: Felkur uses his artificer tools and collected crystals to begin recalibrating the portal

subject: portal recalibration
fact: Recalibrating the portal requires intense concentration and multiple arcane successes over ten rounds.
source_quote: a process requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane successes over ten rounds.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim prepares to block the single iron door leading into the chamber.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein prepare to block the single iron door leading into the chamber.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein prepares to block the single iron door leading into the chamber.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein prepare to block the single iron door leading into the chamber.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear sits on the floor hatch to prevent enemies from entering.
source_quote: The Owlbear sits on the floor hatch to prevent enemies from entering.

subject: portal recalibration stage one
fact: Felkur successfully completes the first stages of the arcane recalibration.
source_quote: Felkur successfully completes the first stages of the arcane recalibration.

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem are heard approaching the door.
source_quote: High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem are heard approaching the door

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris shouts threats of revenge.
source_quote: with Veris shouting threats of revenge.

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem attempts to push open the door but is initially held back.
source_quote: The stone golem attempts to push open the door but is initially held back.

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris commands the golem to tear the door off its hinges.
source_quote: Veris commands the golem to tear the door off its hinges.

subject: portal recalibration stage two
fact: Felkur successfully navigates the second phase of the recalibration.
source_quote: successfully navigating the second phase of the recalibration.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim casts Sanctuary on Felkur to shield him from direct attacks.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Sanctuary on Felkur to shield him from direct attacks

subject: Daein
fact: Daein uses a magical mandolin to cast Invisibility on Felkur.
source_quote: Daein uses a magical mandolin to cast Invisibility on Felkur

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur hides behind a pillar while maintaining the portal's calibration.
source_quote: allowing the gnome to hide behind a pillar while maintaining the portal's calibration.

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem smashes the door open.
source_quote: The stone golem smashes the door open

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris teleports into the room to confront the party.
source_quote: and Veris teleports into the room to confront the party.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move it.
source_quote: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee.
source_quote: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear strikes the stone golem with magical claws.
source_quote: striking it with magical claws.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summons Spirit Guardians that swirl around the battlefield.
source_quote: Bramgrim summons Spirit Guardians that swirl around the battlefield

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: The Spirit Guardians damage both the golem and Veris.
source_quote: damaging both the golem and Veris.

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem while remaining invisible.
source_quote: Felkur, remaining invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem.

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas uses Hunter's Mark on the golem.
source_quote: Akritas uses Hunter's Mark on the golem

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas strikes the golem with a well-aimed shot.
source_quote: and strikes it with a well-aimed shot.

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris teleports across the chamber to gain a tactical advantage.
source_quote: Veris, furious over the party's forgery and intrusion, teleports across the chamber to gain a tactical advantage.

subject: combat status
fact: The session ends mid-combat on round 4.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4

subject: portal collapse
fact: There are 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses.
source_quote: with 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses.
